subcodes.first_line: O Leaf, O Handmaid of God! Upon thee be God's salutation, His mercy, His light and His grace, and We beseech for thee the waves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه یا امه الله علیک سلام الله و رحمته و نوره و فضله و نسئله لک امواج
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
